name: Fountain Farmers Market
notes: On-file website http://localvorecolorado.com is dead: it now 301-redirects to an unrelated business (elpalaciolatintaste.com, a taco restaurant), confirming the domain was abandoned/squatted. No official website or official Facebook/Instagram page could be located for this specific market. Third-party aggregators (coloradolandcan.org, localharvest.org, farmersmarket.country, foraged.com, marketspread.com) confirm the record's identity (address '205 S. Fountain St., Fountain, CO 80817' matches the on-file '205 S St'/80817) and give a contact of Jim/Donna La Chey (719-205-8574, jimlachey@msn.com / donnajlachey@hotmail.com), but per instructions these are not treated as legitimate official sources for filling fields, and the coloradolandcan listing itself is undated/possibly stale. Note there are at least two other, distinct farmers markets in Fountain that should not be confused with this one: 'Fountain City Hall Market' (115-116 S. Main St, Tuesdays 3-7pm, June-Sept per an old 2019-updated listing) and the currently-active 'Fountain Community Metcalf Park Market' / 'Metcalfe Park Farmers Market' (618 E Ohio Ave, Saturdays 8am-2pm, late May-Sept, active Facebook page). No clearly-stated Hours, Months Open, Products, SNAP, Email, Facebook, Instagram, Phone, ADA, Certified Organic, or Address correction could be sourced from an official site/page for THIS market, so no fields were filled.
